title: GENERAL LEGAL AID - 211info
text: LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON CENTRAL OREGON REGIONAL OFFICE GENERAL LEGAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal counseling and representation for individuals who need assistance with routine civil legal matters, usually regarding housing, public benefits, or expungement of criminal records. Eligibility: Income must be at or below 125% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm (541) 385-6950 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 385-6950 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Applicants walk in or call for intake. Those who need assistance before the next scheduled intake or who cannot come to the office should call and speak with the receptionist. If an application is approved, the applicant may speak with an attorney or advocate on the same day they apply. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties SITE HOURS: Telephone: Monday-Thursday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm Walk-in: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm Services: Criminal Record Expungement Assistance General Legal Aid If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
